Who I Am

About Me

I'm a cybersecurity professional and final-year BS Computer Science student with a passion for offensive security and ethical hacking. My work spans web application security, network penetration testing, and vulnerability research across multiple internships in the US, Ghana, and Pakistan.

I've completed the Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) curriculum and earned an A+ grade in the Government of Pakistan's NAVTTC cybersecurity programme. I'm currently advancing through Cisco Networking Academy's Ethical Hacking specialization.

As a Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador, I also contribute to the tech community through knowledge sharing and collaboration.
